creator: archie@whistle.com
text:
Checkout a CVS directory and then "cvs rm" everything in it.
	Now go up a directory and type "cvs update -d -P" and the
	directory will get removed, even though your removals haven't
	been checked in yet.

Fix: 

Don't do that
How-To-Repeat: 
	Checkout a CVS directory and then "cvs rm" everything in it.
	Now go up a directory and type "cvs update -d -P" and the
	directory will get removed, even though your removals haven't
	been checked in yet.
